subject: feat(admin): add coordinate picker and bulk price update
body:
Coordinate picker: text inputs for lat/lng on admin station edit form,
saves via update_station_coordinates RPC (PostGIS geography column can't
be updated via .update() directly).

Bulk price update: dedicated screen for regulated SA fuel price changes
(monthly government gazette). Selects a fuel type, enters new price,
upserts for all active stations via bulk_update_regulated_price RPC.
Button added to admin station list for easy access.

Tags: admin, coordinates, pricing, supabase, rpc
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: admin-tools
Semver: minor

title: add coordinate picker and bulk price update
